SEARCH

Uses of Enum Class
cpdt.common.enums.MeasurementType

Packages that use MeasurementType
Package
Description
cpdt.backend.repositories
Defines the data access layer for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.common.dto
Provides the Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.enums
Provides the enumerated types used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator
Provides the simulation layer of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator.environment
Provides the environmental model used by the chemical plant simulator.

    Method
    Description
    Map<MeasurementType,Double>
    ProcessAreaEnvironment.getEnvironmentalValues()
    Returns an unmodifiable view of all environmental measurements maintained by this process area.
    Methods in cpdt.simulator.environment with parameters of type MeasurementType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    ProcessAreaEnvironment.getEnvironmentalValue(MeasurementType measurementType)
    Returns the current value of the specified environmental measurement.
    double
    PlantEnvironment.getValue(ProcessArea processArea, MeasurementType measurementType)
    Retrieves the current value of the specified environmental measurement from the given process area.
    void
    ProcessAreaEnvironment.setEnvironmentalValue(MeasurementType measurementType, double value)
    Updates the value of the specified environmental measurement and records the time of the modification.
    void
    PlantEnvironment.setValue(ProcessArea processArea, MeasurementType measurementType, double value)
    Updates the value of a specific environmental measurement within the given process area.
